caption:
Etisalat by e& Beach Canteen is back! 🏖️ 

For its 10th anniversary, the beachside pop-up looks extra special! There’s a mocktail bar, colorful instagrammable spots, live music, fun activities, and of course a lot of delicious food to try!

🎟️ FREE ENTRY
📍 Kite Beach behind Sunset Mall
🗓️ Until May 7, 4 PM to 11 PM
